hooks.command:
cd "$PWD" && BRANCH=$(git branch --show-current 2>/dev/null) && RECENT=$(git log --oneline -3 2>/dev/null | head -3) && UNCOMMITTED=$(git status --porcelain 2>/dev/null | wc -l | tr -d ' ') && printf '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"SessionStart","additionalContext":"SESSION CONTEXT:
Branch: %s
Uncommitted files: %s
Recent commits:
%s

REMINDERS:
- If starting a new feature, create a feature branch first (git checkout -b feature/name)
- If continuing previous work, check git status for uncommitted changes
- Read CLAUDE.md for full app architecture before making changes"}}' "$BRANCH" "$UNCOMMITTED" "$RECENT"

cd "$PWD" && NEW_FILES=$(git log --diff-filter=A --name-only --since='12 hours ago' -- 'apps/aquarium_app/lib/screens/' 'apps/aquarium_app/lib/providers/' 'apps/aquarium_app/lib/models/' 'apps/aquarium_app/lib/services/' 2>/dev/null | grep -E '\.dart$' | sort -u | head -10) && UNCOMMITTED=$(git status --porcelain 2>/dev/null | wc -l | tr -d ' ') && MSG="" && if [ "$UNCOMMITTED" -gt 0 ]; then MSG="WARNING: $UNCOMMITTED uncommitted files. Commit and push before ending.
"; fi && if [ -n "$NEW_FILES" ]; then MSG="${MSG}New files added in key directories — update CLAUDE.md:
$NEW_FILES
"; fi && if [ -n "$MSG" ]; then printf '{"systemMessage":"%s"}' "$MSG"; fi
